response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocals precisely match the official lyrics of 'Utauyo!! MIRACLE' (the second verse onwards). The latter segment switches to English spoken dialogue, which has been transcribed manually. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was heavily relied on for spelling and lyric mapping. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed tightly to the audio cues, ensuring there are no cascading delays during the fast-paced chorus.

subtitles.original: ...つかないの
subtitles.english: ...I can't keep up!

subtitles.original: どうしても ホームワーク よりも 重要 課題
subtitles.english: No matter what, it's a more important task than homework.

subtitles.original: 放課後 の お茶 おしゃべり 練習
subtitles.english: After-school tea, chatting, practice.

subtitles.original: ユーモア ナチュラル めくるめく 笑い
subtitles.english: Humor, natural, dizzying laughter,

subtitles.original: ウケ過ぎでお腹痛い
subtitles.english: my stomach hurts from laughing too much.

subtitles.original: 呼吸ぴったし excellent!
subtitles.english: Breathing perfectly, excellent!

subtitles.original: でも苦手なリフまだあったの
subtitles.english: But there was still a riff I was bad at.

subtitles.original: 特訓つきあってくれる?
subtitles.english: Will you accompany me for special training?

subtitles.original: も少し門限までだって帰りたくない
subtitles.english: A little more until the curfew, because I don't want to go home.

subtitles.original: never never…can't say good-bye
subtitles.english: Never never... can't say good-bye

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: I really, really love you!!

subtitles.original: 超絶ぞっこん ルララ wonderful show time
subtitles.english: Transcendent, deeply in love, lalala, wonderful show time!

subtitles.original: 音楽って 音楽って もう私たちまんま
subtitles.english: Music, music, it's just like us!

subtitles.original: スタンディングオベーション賞 オーディエンスなしでも
subtitles.english: Standing ovation award, even without an audience,

subtitles.original: 奏でたい 瞬間 の real を
subtitles.english: I want to play the real of the moment.

subtitles.original: 昨日の後悔って明日の心配って
subtitles.english: Yesterday's regrets, tomorrow's worries,

subtitles.original: ぶっちゃけぶっちゃけ誰得? 何得?
subtitles.english: to be honest, to be honest, who benefits? What's the gain?

subtitles.original: ラッキーはいつだってね “今”つかむもの
subtitles.english: Lucky is always something you grasp "now".

subtitles.original: 欲張れ乙女 与えられん、さらば
subtitles.english: Be greedy, maiden, it won't be given to you, farewell!

subtitles.original: どんな本も書いてない 授業じゃちょっと教わんない
subtitles.english: Not written in any book, you won't be taught in class,

subtitles.original: けど一生忘れない
subtitles.english: but I'll never forget it for the rest of my life.

subtitles.original: この世にないと思ってた奇跡
subtitles.english: The miracle I thought didn't exist in this world,

subtitles.original: 一緒にね歌えば
subtitles.english: if we sing together...

subtitles.original: 信じられるんだ 強くなれるんだ
subtitles.english: I can believe, I can become stronger!

subtitles.original: みんなが大好きっ!!
subtitles.english: We love everyone!!

subtitles.original: 延々続行 ルララ miracle sing time
subtitles.english: Endless continuation, lalala, miracle sing time!

subtitles.original: 歌って 歌って 愛伝える最強手段
subtitles.english: Sing, sing, the strongest way to convey love!

subtitles.original: つたない曲でも 微妙な歌詞でも
subtitles.english: Even with a clumsy song, even with subtle lyrics,

subtitles.original: 届けたい 精一杯のsoul 等身大のlifeを
subtitles.english: I want to deliver my soul, with all my might, my life-sized life.

subtitles.original: 今日は昨日みたい? 明日は今日みたい?
subtitles.english: Is today like yesterday? Is tomorrow like today?

subtitles.original: 大丈夫 大丈夫 楽しかっ たら大正解
subtitles.english: It's okay, it's okay, if it's fun, it's the right answer!

subtitles.original: ロッカーはいつだってね “今”やんちゃ盛り
subtitles.english: Lockers are always, "now", in their naughty prime.

subtitles.original: 進め乙女 抱きしめて、希望を
subtitles.english: Advance, maiden, hold onto hope!

subtitles.original: 大好き 大好き
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you,

subtitles.original: 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: thank you for the love!

subtitles.original: 歌うよ 歌うよ
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing,

subtitles.original: 心こめて 今日も歌うよ
subtitles.english: putting my heart into it, I'll sing today too!

subtitles.original: 大好き 大好き
subtitles.english: I love you, I love you,

subtitles.original: 大好きをありがとう
subtitles.english: thank you for the love!

subtitles.original: 歌うよ 歌うよ
subtitles.english: I'll sing, I'll sing,

subtitles.original: 愛をこめて ずっと歌うよ
subtitles.english: putting my love into it, I'll sing forever!
